title: More Villagers Professions
description: Not enough villager professions ? This mod is for you ! This mod adds new villager professions.
body:
**Not enough villager professions ?** This mod is for you !

The mod **More Villager Professions** is a mod that adds many new features such as : 

  - New **villager professions** and many new **trades** (_End villager, Nether villager, Classic villager ..._)
  - New **job blocks** (_End block, Nether block..._) with its **recipe**
  - A new **creative tab** : More Villager Professions
